languages.text: {n}Последние слова звучат заученно и инородно, словно он произносит их впервые. Однако, услышав их, люди вокруг крепче сжимают оружие, а блондин становится куда увереннее.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Последние слова звучат заученно и инородно, словно он произносит их впервые. Однако, услышав их, люди вокруг крепче сжимают оружие, а блондин становится куда увереннее.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The last words sound rehearsed and unfamiliar, as if he's using them for the very first time. Yet, upon hearing them, the people around you grip their weapons tighter, and the blond man grows noticeably more confident.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Последние слова звучат заученно и инородно, словно он произносит их впервые. Однако, услышав их, люди вокруг крепче сжимают оружие, а блондин становится куда увереннее.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The final words sound rehearsed and foreign, as if he uses them for the very first time. Yet, upon hearing them, the people around you grip their weapons tighter, and the blond man grows noticeably more confident.{/n}

{n}The last words sound rehearsed and unfamiliar, as if he's using them for the very first time. Yet, upon hearing them, the people around you grip their weapons tighter, and the blond man grows noticeably more confident.{/n}

{n}The blond man speaking to you is stockily built and wearing armour fashioned from tree bark, but in the style of standard Imperial flak gear. A burn covering half his face gives the impression of a two-faced monster.{/n}

{n}The final words sound rehearsed and foreign, as if he uses them for the very first time. Yet, upon hearing them, the people around you grip their weapons tighter, and the blond man grows noticeably more confident.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたに話しかけている金髪の人は、がっしりした体格で、樹皮で作った鎧を着ている。帝国の標準的な防弾装備のスタイルだが。顔の半分を覆う火傷は、二面体の怪物のように見える。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The blond man speaking to you is stockily built and wearing armour fashioned from tree bark, but in the style of standard Imperial flak gear. A burn covering half his face gives the impression of a two-faced monster.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Son kelimeler prova edilmiş ve sanki ilk kez söylüyormuş gibi ona yabancı geliyor. Yine de etrafındaki insanlar, bunları duyunca silahlarını daha sıkı kavrıyor. Sarışın adam da gözle görülür şekilde kendinden emin bir hâl alıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The last words sound rehearsed and unfamiliar, as if he's using them for the very first time. Yet, upon hearing them, the people around you grip their weapons tighter, and the blond man grows noticeably more confident.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Son kelimeler prova edilmiş ve sanki ilk kez söylüyormuş gibi ona yabancı geliyor. Yine de etrafındaki insanlar, bunları duyunca silahlarını daha sıkı kavrıyor. Sarışın adam da gözle görülür şekilde kendinden emin bir hâl alıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}最后几句话听起来像是在背台词，透着生疏，仿佛他这辈子头一次说这种话。然而，听到这些话，周围的人却把武器攥得更紧了，那金发男人的气势也明显强了几分。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The last words sound rehearsed and unfamiliar, as if he's using them for the very first time. Yet, upon hearing them, the people around you grip their weapons tighter, and the blond man grows noticeably more confident.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}最后几句话听起来像是在背台词，透着生疏，仿佛他这辈子头一次说这种话。然而，听到这些话，周围的人却把武器攥得更紧了，那金发男人的气势也明显强了几分。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die letzten Worte klingen auswendig gelernt, als hätte er sie gerade zum ersten Mal benutzt. Als sie sie hören, verstärken die Leute um dich herum allerdings den Griff um ihre Waffen und der blonde Mann wird sichtlich selbstbewusster.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The last words sound rehearsed and unfamiliar, as if he's using them for the very first time. Yet, upon hearing them, the people around you grip their weapons tighter, and the blond man grows noticeably more confident.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die letzten Worte klingen auswendig gelernt, als hätte er sie gerade zum ersten Mal benutzt. Als sie sie hören, verstärken die Leute um dich herum allerdings den Griff um ihre Waffen und der blonde Mann wird sichtlich selbstbewusster.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ces derniers mots lui semblent peu familiers, comme s'il les avait appris par cœur sans jamais avoir eu l'occasion de les répéter jusqu'à présent. Pour autant, dès qu'ils les entendent, les gens rassemblés autour de vous resserrent leur prise sur leurs armes et votre vis-à-vis gagne visiblement en assurance.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The last words sound rehearsed and unfamiliar, as if he's using them for the very first time. Yet, upon hearing them, the people around you grip their weapons tighter, and the blond man grows noticeably more confident.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ces derniers mots lui semblent peu familiers, comme s'il les avait appris par cœur sans jamais avoir eu l'occasion de les répéter jusqu'à présent. Pour autant, dès qu'ils les entendent, les gens rassemblés autour de vous resserrent leur prise sur leurs armes et votre vis-à-vis gagne visiblement en assurance.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sus últimas palabras parecen practicadas y extrañas, como si fuera la primera vez que las pronuncia en voz alta. Aun así, al oírlas, la gente que te rodea aferra sus armas con más fuerza y el rubio parece ganar confianza.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The last words sound rehearsed and unfamiliar, as if he's using them for the very first time. Yet, upon hearing them, the people around you grip their weapons tighter, and the blond man grows noticeably more confident.{/n}
